name: Rias Gremory & Venelana Bael (Oyakodon)
description:
This time, Rias has invited you alone to visit her family in the Underworld, but this time with the news about Venelana divorcing Zeoticus. Fortunately, their separation went amicably, with Zeoticus understanding that he wasn't paying her enough attention because of his harem. It is a good thing that he never discovered her affair with you.

Ignore the thumbnail! You know this is am AnyPoV character!

(I'm afraid to say, there isn't any good art of them together, almost all of it comes from a card game or something like that.)

(This is the an example of what I'm talking about)
